title: fix: remove file-based IP logging (grew to 22GB)
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The 22GB diet
gist.blurb: We put our IP logging on a strict diet after it ate 22GB of disk space. The hive is feeling much lighter now!
gist.summary: Removed file-based IP logging that was causing disk space issues by growing to 22GB.
gist.impact: Improves server stability and prevents disk exhaustion by relying on console logs instead of a massive local file.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a massive stack of paper logs representing the 22GB file, with Polly the bee holding a broom to clean up the mess.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a massive, towering stack of paper logs while the bee mascot watches amused holding a tiny broom. Retro terminal nearby glows lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a massive, towering stack of paper logs while the bee mascot watches amused holding a tiny broom.
